title: kobresia simpliciuscula var. subholarctica
intro: Kobresia simpliciuscula var. subholarctica, also known as Arctic Kobresia, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Kobresia simpliciuscula var. subholarctica is often used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, as well as in traditional folk remedies in certain parts of the world.
